# This directory stores serialized ML models.
# 
# Files in this directory are NOT committed to git (see .gitignore).
# 
# Models are:
#   - Downloaded automatically during Docker build (YOLOv8 weights)
#   - Generated by the training pipeline (XGBoost model)
#   - Versioned by filename: wait_time_predictor_v1.pkl, wait_time_predictor_v2.pkl
#
# To download the latest model manually:
#   make shell-ai
#   python -m app.ml.trainer --download-latest
